tasks.description: In the project repository https://github.com/beautyarbutin/half_test, inspect the existing project structure and implement the minimal webpage required by the task goal so that the page displays the exact text: hello,zju!
tasks.expected_output: Project repository contains the webpage implementation showing hello,zju! with changes ready for build or static verification.

tasks.description: Run the appropriate local verification for the project, such as opening the static HTML or running the repository's build/test command if present. Confirm the rendered page or generated artifact displays hello,zju! exactly.
tasks.expected_output: Verification result confirms the webpage displays hello,zju!, with any relevant command output or manual check summarized.

tasks.task_name: Publish project and HALF coordination outputs
tasks.description: Commit and push code changes to the project repository. Write required coordination artifacts under HALF repository path outputs/proj-3-81f13b, including result.json and usage.json after execution, then commit and push those HALF repository updates.
tasks.expected_output: Project repository has pushed implementation changes; HALF repository has pushed coordination artifacts under outputs/proj-3-81f13b.
